title: DoctorPat's Coffee Mod
description: This mod adds coffee, new items, new mobs, and a new dimension
body:
# Coffee Mod
![Mod Thumbnail Picture](https://github.com/AmazingDoor5579/Fabric-Coffee-Mod-1.19/blob/master/Images/Thumbnail.png?raw=true)

This mod adds coffee beans that are used for more than just making coffee with a Q-Rag. Coffee bean blocks can be used to build a portal to a new dimension to explore, find underground buildings, find new loot, discover new mobs, and more. This new dimension has a lot of elevation so consider making a jet pack to bring with you.
### Trailer
https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=tCu8YBBC_2U
